results.question: 现在整体出租率怎么样？
results.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS business_type,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_transfer_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupied_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fh.id = fr.housing_id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS business_type,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_transfer_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupied_rooms
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(wh.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(wr.transfer_status, 0) <> 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS business_type,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_transfer_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupied_rooms
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(jh.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(jr.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
)
SELECT
    business_type,
    total_rooms,
    leased_rooms,
    pending_transfer_rooms,
    occupied_rooms,
    vacant_rooms,
    occupancy_rate
FROM (
    SELECT
        1 AS sort_order,
        '集中整租' AS business_type,
        total_rooms,
        leased_rooms,
        pending_transfer_rooms,
        occupied_rooms,
        total_rooms - occupied_rooms AS vacant_rooms,
        CONCAT(ROUND(occupied_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2), '%') AS occupancy_rate
    FROM base
    WHERE business_type = 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS sort_order,
        '整租' AS business_type,
        total_rooms,
        leased_rooms,
        pending_transfer_rooms,
        occupied_rooms,
        total_rooms - occupied_rooms AS vacant_rooms,
        CONCAT(ROUND(occupied_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2), '%') AS occupancy_rate
    FROM base
    WHERE business_type = 2

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS sort_order,
        '合租' AS business_type,
        total_rooms,
        leased_rooms,
        pending_transfer_rooms,
        occupied_rooms,
        total_rooms - occupied_rooms AS vacant_rooms,
        CONCAT(ROUND(occupied_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2), '%') AS occupancy_rate
    FROM base
    WHERE business_type = 3

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        4 AS sort_order,
        '整体' AS business_type,
        SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(leased_rooms) AS leased_rooms,
        SUM(pending_transfer_rooms) AS pending_transfer_rooms,
        SUM(occupied_rooms) AS occupied_rooms,
        SUM(total_rooms) - SUM(occupied_rooms) AS vacant_rooms,
        CONCAT(ROUND(SUM(occupied_rooms) / NULLIF(SUM(total_rooms), 0) * 100, 2), '%') AS occupancy_rate
    FROM base
) t
ORDER BY sort_order;

results.question: 刘洋手上管了几套房源？

SELECT
  u.id AS user_id,
  u.realname,
  COUNT(*) AS managed_housing_count
FROM qft_user u
JOIN (
  SELECT b.user_id, b.housing_id, b.businessType
  FROM qft_butler b
  JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON b.businessType = 1
   AND b.housing_id = h.id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE b.company_id = 1001

  FROM qft_butler b
  JOIN qft_whole_housing h
    ON b.businessType = 2
   AND b.housing_id = h.id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE b.company_id = 1001

  UNION ALL

  SELECT b.user_id, b.housing_id, b.businessType
  FROM qft_butler b
  JOIN qft_joint_housing h

results.question: 集中式现在签了多少个租客？

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS tenant_count
FROM qft_focus_tenants t
INNER JOIN qft_focus_room r
    ON r.id = t.room_id
   AND r.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON h.id = r.housing_id
   AND h.company_id = 1001

SELECT
  t.id AS tenant_id,
  t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
  t.phone,
  t.id_card,
  t.lease_starttime,
  t.lease_endtime,
  h.house_code,
  ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
  h.building,
  h.unit_name,
  h.door_number,
  r.room_number,
  s.name AS store_name
FROM qft_joint_tenants t
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room r
  ON r.id = t.room_id
  AND r.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0

  ON h.id = r.housing_id
  AND h.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
  ON ap.id = h.property_adrr
  AND ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0

  ON s.id = h.store_id
  AND s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE months AS (
  SELECT DATE_SUB(CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE), INTERVAL 5 MONTH) AS month_start
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  FROM months
  WHERE month_start < CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
),
finance_month AS (
  SELECT DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS month_start,
         SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS income_amount,
         SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS expend_amount
  FROM qft_finance
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND cashier = 1
    AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE), INTERVAL 5 MONTH)
    AND account_date < DATE_ADD(CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01')
),
result AS (
  SELECT DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS month,
         IFNULL(f.income_amount, 0.00) AS income_amount,
         IFNULL(f.expend_amount, 0.00) AS expend_amount,
         m.month_start AS sort_month
  FROM months m
  LEFT JOIN finance_month f
    ON f.month_start = DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m-01')
)
SELECT month, income_amount, expend_amount
FROM (
  SELECT month, income_amount, expend_amount, 1 AS sort_no, sort_month
  FROM result
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '合计' AS month,
         SUM(income_amount) AS income_amount,
         SUM(expend_amount) AS expend_amount,
         2 AS sort_no,
         NULL AS sort_month
  FROM result
) t
ORDER BY sort_no, sort_month;

      AND fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY fr.store_id

      AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(wh.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
    GROUP BY wh.store_id

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.business_type,
  t.total_receivable,
  t.total_payable,
  t.total_received,
  t.total_paid,
  t.book_profit,
  t.real_profit,
  t.real_profit_rate,
  CASE
    WHEN c.whole_real_profit > c.joint_real_profit AND t.sale_type = 2 THEN '更赚钱'
    WHEN c.whole_real_profit < c.joint_real_profit AND t.sale_type = 3 THEN '更赚钱'
    WHEN c.whole_real_profit = c.joint_real_profit THEN '一样赚钱'
    ELSE '次之'
  END AS business_compare_result,
  CASE
    WHEN c.whole_real_profit > c.joint_real_profit THEN '整租更赚钱'
    WHEN c.whole_real_profit < c.joint_real_profit THEN '合租更赚钱'
    ELSE '整租和合租一样赚钱'
  END AS compare_result,
  ROUND(ABS(c.whole_real_profit - c.joint_real_profit), 2) AS profit_gap
FROM (
  SELECT
    sale_type,
    CASE sale_type
      WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
      WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
    END AS business_type,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_receivable,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_payable,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_received,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN total_real_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_paid,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_trade_money WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN -total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS book_profit,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN -total_real_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS real_profit,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN -total_real_money ELSE 0 END)
             / SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money ELSE 0 END) * 100
      END,
      2
    ) AS real_profit_rate
  FROM qft_bill
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND is_delete = 0
    AND is_invalid = 0
    AND sale_type IN (2, 3)
  GROUP BY sale_type
) t
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    ROUND(SUM(CASE
      WHEN sale_type = 2 AND trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money
      WHEN sale_type = 2 AND trade_type = 2 THEN -total_real_money
      ELSE 0
    END), 2) AS whole_real_profit,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE
      WHEN sale_type = 3 AND trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money
      WHEN sale_type = 3 AND trade_type = 2 THEN -total_real_money
      ELSE 0
    END), 2) AS joint_real_profit
  FROM qft_bill
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND is_delete = 0
    AND is_invalid = 0
    AND sale_type IN (2, 3)
) c
ORDER BY t.real_profit DESC;

      AND b.trade_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    GROUP BY b.store_id
),
repair_stats AS (
    SELECT
        r.store_id,
        COUNT(*) AS repair_count,
        AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, r.create_time, COALESCE(r.receive_time, NOW())) / 60.0) AS avg_response_hours
    FROM qft_room_repair r
    INNER JOIN selected_stores ss ON ss.store_id = r.store_id
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND r.create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
      AND r.create_time < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    GROUP BY r.store_id
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        ss.store_id,
        ss.store_name,
        COALESCE(rs.total_rooms, 0) AS total_rooms,
        COALESCE(rs.rented_rooms, 0) AS rented_rooms,
        COALESCE(inc.actual_income, 0) AS actual_income,
        COALESCE(ds.receivable_money, 0) AS receivable_money,
        COALESCE(ds.debt_money, 0) AS debt_money,
        COALESCE(rp.repair_count, 0) AS repair_count,
        rp.avg_response_hours,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(rs.total_rooms, 0) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE COALESCE(rs.rented_rooms, 0) / COALESCE(rs.total_rooms, 0)
        END AS occupancy_rate,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(ds.receivable_money, 0) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE COALESCE(ds.debt_money, 0) / COALESCE(ds.receivable_money, 0)
        END AS arrears_rate
    FROM selected_stores ss
    LEFT JOIN room_stats rs ON rs.store_id = ss.store_id
    LEFT JOIN income_stats inc ON inc.store_id = ss.store_id
    LEFT JOIN debt_stats ds ON ds.store_id = ss.store_id
    LEFT JOIN repair_stats rp ON rp.store_id = ss.store_id
),
scored AS (
    SELECT
        b.*,
        ROUND(b.occupancy_rate * 100, 2) AS occupancy_score,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN MAX(b.actual_income) OVER () = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE b.actual_income / MAX(b.actual_income) OVER () * 100
            END,
            2
        ) AS income_score,
        ROUND(GREATEST(0, 1 - b.arrears_rate) * 100, 2) AS arrears_score,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN b.avg_response_hours IS NULL THEN 100
                WHEN MAX(b.avg_response_hours) OVER () = MIN(b.avg_response_hours) OVER () THEN 100
                ELSE (MAX(b.avg_response_hours) OVER () - b.avg_response_hours)
                     / NULLIF(MAX(b.avg_response_hours) OVER () - MIN(b.avg_response_hours) OVER (), 0) * 100
            END,
            2
        ) AS repair_score
    FROM base b
)
SELECT
    s.store_id,
    s.store_name,
    s.total_rooms,
    s.rented_rooms,
    ROUND(s.occupancy_rate * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
    ROUND(s.actual_income, 2) AS actual_income,
    ROUND(s.receivable_money, 2) AS receivable_money,
    ROUND(s.debt_money, 2) AS debt_money,
    ROUND(s.arrears_rate * 100, 2) AS arrears_rate_pct,
    s.repair_count,
    ROUND(s.avg_response_hours, 2) AS avg_response_hours,
    s.occupancy_score,
    s.income_score,
    s.arrears_score,
    s.repair_score,
    ROUND(
        s.occupancy_score * 0.35
        + s.income_score * 0.30
        + s.arrears_score * 0.20
        + s.repair_score * 0.15,
        2
    ) AS health_score,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (
        ORDER BY
            (
                s.occupancy_score * 0.35
                + s.income_score * 0.30
                + s.arrears_score * 0.20
                + s.repair_score * 0.15
            ) DESC
    ) AS health_rank
FROM scored s
ORDER BY health_score DESC, s.store_id;

        t.room_id
    FROM qft_focus_tenants t
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND t.name = '张三'
),
latest_renewal AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            ctr.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY ctr.tenant_id
                ORDER BY
                    CASE WHEN NOW() BETWEEN ctr.start_time AND ctr.end_time THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
                    ctr.start_time DESC,
                    ctr.create_time DESC,
                    ctr.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
        JOIN tenant_info t
          ON ctr.tenant_id = t.id
        WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) x
    WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_earnest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            e.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY e.tenant_id
                ORDER BY
                    CASE WHEN NOW() BETWEEN e.contract_start_time AND e.contract_end_time THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
                    e.contract_start_time DESC,
                    e.pay_earnest_time DESC,
                    e.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_focus_room_earnest e
        JOIN tenant_info t
          ON e.tenant_id = t.id
        WHERE e.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(e.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND e.earnest_status = 2
    ) x
    WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_delivery AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            d.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY d.tenant_id
                ORDER BY d.create_time DESC, d.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_focus_delivery_order d
        JOIN tenant_info t
          ON d.tenant_id = t.id
        WHERE d.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(d.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(d.role, 1) = 1
    ) x
    WHERE x.rn = 1
)
SELECT
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.name AS tenant_name,
    TRIM(CONCAT_WS(
        ' ',
        NULLIF(d.property_address, ''),
        NULLIF(d.door_number, ''),
        CASE
            WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL AND pr_from_room.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(pr_from_room.room_number, '-', r.room_number)
            WHEN pr_direct.id IS NOT NULL THEN pr_direct.room_number
            WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN r.room_number
            ELSE NULL
        END
    )) AS rented_room,
    COALESCE(rr.room_money, e.appoint_rent_money) AS monthly_rent
FROM tenant_info t
LEFT JOIN latest_renewal rr
  ON rr.tenant_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN latest_earnest e
  ON e.tenant_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room r
  ON t.room_id = r.id
 AND r.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr_from_room
  ON r.parent_id = pr_from_room.id
 AND pr_from_room.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(pr_from_room.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr_direct
  ON t.room_id = pr_direct.id
 AND pr_direct.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(pr_direct.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN latest_delivery d
  ON d.tenant_id = t.id
ORDER BY t.id DESC;

        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
    WHERE chr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND chr.business_type = 2
),
latest_tenant AS (
    SELECT
        ctr.housing_id,
        ctr.room_id,
        ctr.room_money AS rental_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY ctr.room_id
            ORDER BY ctr.start_time DESC, ctr.create_time DESC, ctr.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
    WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ctr.business_type = 2
),
profit_data AS (
    SELECT
        fh.id AS housing_id,
        lt.room_id,
        fh.house_code,
        fh.building,
        fh.unit_name,
        pr.room_number,
        lh.acquisition_price,
        lt.rental_price,
        lt.rental_price - lh.acquisition_price AS price_difference
    FROM latest_tenant lt
    JOIN latest_housing lh
        ON lt.housing_id = lh.housing_id
       AND lh.rn = 1
    JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON lt.housing_id = fh.id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr
        ON lt.room_id = pr.id
       AND pr.housing_id = fh.id
       AND pr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(pr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE lt.rn = 1
)
SELECT
    housing_id,
    room_id,
    house_code,
    CONCAT_WS('', building, unit_name, room_number) AS room_name,
    acquisition_price AS acquisition_price,
    rental_price AS rental_price,
    price_difference,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY price_difference DESC, housing_id ASC, room_id ASC) AS profit_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY price_difference DESC, housing_id ASC, room_id ASC) = 1 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS is_max_profit
FROM profit_data
ORDER BY profit_rank;

    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND business_type IN (1, 2, 3)
      AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time
),

    SELECT
        SUM(IFNULL(total_trade_money, 0)) AS total_receivable,
        SUM(IFNULL(total_real_money, 0)) AS total_collected
    FROM qft_bill
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
      AND trade_type = 1
      AND trade_date <= NOW()
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        hs.total_housing,
        LEAST(IFNULL(rs.rented_housing, 0), IFNULL(hs.total_housing, 0)) AS rented_housing,
        GREATEST(IFNULL(hs.total_housing, 0) - LEAST(IFNULL(rs.rented_housing, 0), IFNULL(hs.total_housing, 0)), 0) AS vacant_housing,
        IFNULL(r.total_receivable, 0) AS total_receivable,
        IFNULL(r.total_collected, 0) AS total_collected
    FROM housing_stock hs
    CROSS JOIN rented_stock rs
    CROSS JOIN receivable_stats r
)
SELECT
    total_housing,
    rented_housing,
    vacant_housing,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE rented_housing / total_housing * 100 END, 2) AS rental_rate,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN total_receivable = 0 THEN 100 ELSE total_collected / total_receivable * 100 END, 2) AS collection_rate,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE vacant_housing / total_housing * 100 END, 2) AS vacancy_rate,
    ROUND(
        (CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE rented_housing / total_housing * 100 END) * 0.45
        + (CASE WHEN total_receivable = 0 THEN 100 ELSE total_collected / total_receivable * 100 END) * 0.35
        + (CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (100 - vacant_housing / total_housing * 100) END) * 0.20,
        2
    ) AS health_score,
    CASE
        WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN '暂无在管房源，无法评估整体业务健康度'
        WHEN (CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE rented_housing / total_housing * 100 END) >= 95

         AND (CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE vacant_housing / total_housing * 100 END) <= 5
            THEN '健康度优秀：出租率高、回款率高、空置率低'
        WHEN (CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE rented_housing / total_housing * 100 END) >= 90
         AND (CASE WHEN total_receivable = 0 THEN 100 ELSE total_collected / total_receivable * 100 END) >= 90
         AND (CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE vacant_housing / total_housing * 100 END) <= 10
            THEN '健康度良好：经营稳健，建议持续优化去化与催收'
        WHEN (CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE rented_housing / total_housing * 100 END) >= 80
         AND (CASE WHEN total_receivable = 0 THEN 100 ELSE total_collected / total_receivable * 100 END) >= 85
         AND (CASE WHEN total_housing = 0 THEN 0 ELSE vacant_housing / total_housing * 100 END) <= 20
            THEN '健康度一般：出租或回款有提升空间，需关注空置'
        ELSE '健康度偏弱：出租率/回款率偏低或空置率偏高，建议重点跟进'
    END AS comprehensive_evaluation
FROM base;

        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) <> 1 THEN r.id END) AS vacant_rooms,
        ROUND(

            4
        ) AS rentability_rate
    FROM qft_area_property ap
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
      ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
     AND h.company_id = 1001

    GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
),
easy_rank AS (

        '好租' AS rentability_type,
        property_name,
        housing_count,
        total_rooms,
        leased_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        rentability_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY rentability_rate DESC, leased_rooms DESC, total_rooms DESC, property_name ASC
        ) AS rank_no
    FROM property_room_stats
),
hard_rank AS (

        property_name,
        housing_count,
        total_rooms,
        leased_rooms,

    SELECT * FROM hard_rank WHERE rank_no <= 10

    FROM qft_bill b

    GROUP BY b.store_id
),
metrics AS (
    SELECT
        mh.store_id,
        mh.total_housing_count,
        IFNULL(oh.occupied_housing_count, 0) AS occupied_housing_count,
        IFNULL(ROUND(IFNULL(oh.occupied_housing_count, 0) / NULLIF(mh.total_housing_count, 0), 4), 0) AS occupancy_rate,
        IFNULL(si.current_month_income, 0) AS current_month_income,
        IFNULL(ROUND(IFNULL(si.current_month_income, 0) / NULLIF(mh.total_housing_count, 0), 2), 0) AS income_per_housing,
        IFNULL(sa.current_arrears_money, 0) AS current_arrears_money,

                ELSE IFNULL(o.occupied_housing_count, 0) / h.total_housing_count * 100
            END,
            2
        ) AS occupancy_rate,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN h.total_housing_count = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE (h.total_housing_count - IFNULL(o.occupied_housing_count, 0)) / h.total_housing_count * 100
            END,
            2
        ) AS vacancy_rate,
        ROUND(bs.receivable_amount, 2) AS receivable_amount,
        ROUND(bs.received_amount, 2) AS received_amount,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN bs.receivable_amount = 0 THEN 100
                ELSE bs.received_amount / bs.receivable_amount * 100
            END,
            2
        ) AS collection_rate,
        ROUND(
            (
                CASE
                    WHEN h.total_housing_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE IFNULL(o.occupied_housing_count, 0) / h.total_housing_count * 100
                END
            ) * 0.6
            +
            (
                CASE
                    WHEN bs.receivable_amount = 0 THEN 100
                    ELSE bs.received_amount / bs.receivable_amount * 100
                END
            ) * 0.4,
            2
        ) AS business_health_score
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS total_housing_count
        FROM active_housing
    ) h
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS occupied_housing_count
        FROM occupied_housing
    ) o
    CROSS JOIN bill_stats bs
)
SELECT
    total_housing_count AS `在管房源数`,
    occupied_housing_count AS `已出租房源数`,
    vacant_housing_count AS `空置房源数`,
    occupancy_rate AS `出租率(%)`,
    vacancy_rate AS `空置率(%)`,
    receivable_amount AS `应收金额`,
    received_amount AS `已回款金额`,
    collection_rate AS `回款率(%)`,
    business_health_score AS `业务健康度评分`,
    CASE
        WHEN total_housing_count = 0 AND receivable_amount = 0 THEN '暂无足够经营数据'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 95 AND collection_rate >= 95 AND vacancy_rate <= 5 THEN '业务健康度优秀'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 90 AND collection_rate >= 90 AND vacancy_rate <= 10 THEN '业务健康度良好'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 80 AND collection_rate >= 80 AND vacancy_rate <= 20 THEN '业务健康度一般，需持续关注空置与回款'
        ELSE '业务健康度预警，建议优先提升出租效率与催收回款'
    END AS `综合评估`
FROM metrics;

        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN sale_type = 3 THEN total_receivable END), 0) AS joint_total_receivable,
        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN sale_type = 3 THEN total_income END), 0) AS joint_total_income
    FROM bill_summary
),
metrics AS (
    SELECT
        focus_total_payable,
        focus_total_expend,
        focus_total_receivable,
        focus_total_income,
        focus_total_receivable - focus_total_income AS focus_income_outstanding,
        focus_total_payable - focus_total_expend AS focus_expend_outstanding,
        focus_total_income - focus_total_expend AS focus_net_profit,
        CASE
            WHEN focus_total_expend = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND((focus_total_income - focus_total_expend) / focus_total_expend * 100, 2)
        END AS focus_roi_percent,
        joint_total_payable,
        joint_total_expend,
        joint_total_receivable,
        joint_total_income,
        joint_total_receivable - joint_total_income AS joint_income_outstanding,
        joint_total_payable - joint_total_expend AS joint_expend_outstanding,
        joint_total_income - joint_total_expend AS joint_net_profit,
        CASE
            WHEN joint_total_expend = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND((joint_total_income - joint_total_expend) / joint_total_expend * 100, 2)
        END AS joint_roi_percent
    FROM pivoted
)
SELECT
    focus_total_payable,
    focus_total_expend,
    focus_total_receivable,
    focus_total_income,
    focus_income_outstanding,
    focus_expend_outstanding,
    focus_net_profit,
    focus_roi_percent,
    joint_total_payable,
    joint_total_expend,
    joint_total_receivable,
    joint_total_income,
    joint_income_outstanding,
    joint_expend_outstanding,
    joint_net_profit,
    joint_roi_percent,
    CASE
        WHEN focus_total_expend < joint_total_expend THEN '集中投入更低'
        WHEN focus_total_expend > joint_total_expend THEN '合租投入更低'
        ELSE '两者投入相同'
    END AS invest_compare_by_real_expend,
    CASE
        WHEN focus_total_income > joint_total_income THEN '集中收益更高'
        WHEN focus_total_income < joint_total_income THEN '合租收益更高'
        ELSE '两者收益相同'
    END AS income_compare_by_real_income,
    CASE
        WHEN focus_net_profit > joint_net_profit THEN '集中净收益更高'
        WHEN focus_net_profit < joint_net_profit THEN '合租净收益更高'
        ELSE '两者净收益相同'
    END AS profit_compare,
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(focus_roi_percent, -99999999) > IFNULL(joint_roi_percent, -99999999) THEN '集中回报率更高，更划算'
        WHEN IFNULL(focus_roi_percent, -99999999) < IFNULL(joint_roi_percent, -99999999) THEN '合租回报率更高，更划算'
        ELSE '两者回报率相同'
    END AS roi_compare,
    CASE
        WHEN focus_net_profit > joint_net_profit
             AND IFNULL(focus_roi_percent, -99999999) >= IFNULL(joint_roi_percent, -99999999) THEN '集中更划算'
        WHEN joint_net_profit > focus_net_profit
             AND IFNULL(joint_roi_percent, -99999999) >= IFNULL(focus_roi_percent, -99999999) THEN '合租更划算'
        WHEN focus_total_expend < joint_total_expend
             AND focus_net_profit >= joint_net_profit THEN '集中更划算'
        WHEN joint_total_expend < focus_total_expend
             AND joint_net_profit >= focus_net_profit THEN '合租更划算'
        ELSE '需结合业务场景进一步判断'
    END AS final_conclusion
FROM metrics;

    CASE

        WHEN IFNULL(inc.unpaid_bill_count, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(inc.partial_paid_bill_count, 0) > 0 THEN '部分已交，仍有欠款'
        WHEN IFNULL(inc.partial_paid_bill_count, 0) > 0 THEN '部分已交'
        ELSE '未交清'
    END AS rent_pay_status,
    IFNULL(inc.total_debt_money, 0.00) AS arrears_amount,
    inc.latest_collection_date
FROM qft_focus_tenants t
JOIN qft_focus_room r
    ON t.room_id = r.id
   AND r.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON r.housing_id = h.id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0

WITH RECURSIVE months AS (
    SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE) AS month_start
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    FROM months
    WHERE month_start < CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
),
finance_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS income_amount,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS expend_amount

    GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m')
)
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS month,
    COALESCE(fm.income_amount, 0) AS income_amount,
    COALESCE(fm.expend_amount, 0) AS expend_amount
FROM months m
LEFT JOIN finance_monthly fm
    ON fm.month = DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m')

WITH property_stats AS (
    SELECT
        ap.id AS property_id,
        a.area_name,
        ap.property_adrr AS community_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS housing_count,
        COUNT(r.id) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_rooms,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 4) AS rent_rate
    FROM qft_area_property ap
    JOIN qft_area a
        ON ap.area_id = a.id
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
    JOIN qft_focus_room r
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
    WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND a.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(a.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
      AND r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY ap.id, a.area_name, ap.property_adrr
    HAVING COUNT(r.id) > 0
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        property_id,
        area_name,
        community_name,
        housing_count,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        rent_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY rent_rate DESC, rented_rooms DESC, total_rooms DESC, property_id
        ) AS easy_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY rent_rate ASC, vacant_rooms DESC, total_rooms DESC, property_id
        ) AS hard_rank
    FROM property_stats
)
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        '好租' AS rent_level,
        area_name,
        community_name,
        housing_count,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        rent_rate,
        easy_rank AS rank_no
    FROM ranked
    WHERE easy_rank <= 10

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '不好租' AS rent_level,
        area_name,
        community_name,
        housing_count,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        rent_rate,
        hard_rank AS rank_no
    FROM ranked
    WHERE hard_rank <= 10
) t
ORDER BY FIELD(rent_level, '好租', '不好租'), rank_no;

WITH housing_mode AS (
    SELECT
        fr.housing_id,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN fr.focus_joint_mode = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 3
            WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN fr.focus_joint_mode = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 2
        END AS business_mode
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
      ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
     AND fh.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fr.focus_joint_mode IN (2, 3)
    GROUP BY fr.housing_id
),
profit_stat AS (
    SELECT
        hm.business_mode,
        SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
        SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_expend,
        SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0) ELSE -IFNULL(f.money, 0) END) AS profit
    FROM qft_finance f
    JOIN housing_mode hm
      ON f.housing_id = hm.housing_id
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.cashier = 1
    GROUP BY hm.business_mode
)
SELECT
    ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 2 THEN total_income END), 0), 2) AS whole_income,
    ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 2 THEN total_expend END), 0), 2) AS whole_expend,
    ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 2 THEN profit END), 0), 2) AS whole_profit,
    ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 3 THEN total_income END), 0), 2) AS joint_income,
    ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 3 THEN total_expend END), 0), 2) AS joint_expend,
    ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 3 THEN profit END), 0), 2) AS joint_profit,
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 2 THEN profit END), 0) > IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 3 THEN profit END), 0) THEN '整租'
        WHEN IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 2 THEN profit END), 0) < IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 3 THEN profit END), 0) THEN '合租'
        ELSE '持平'
    END AS more_profitable,
    ROUND(
        ABS(
            IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 2 THEN profit END), 0) -
            IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN business_mode = 3 THEN profit END), 0)
        ),
        2
    ) AS profit_gap
FROM profit_stat;

  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(rc.renovation_cost, 0) = 0 THEN NULL

  END AS `租金回收倍数`,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(rc.renovation_cost, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(ri.rental_income_received, 0) - rc.renovation_cost) / rc.renovation_cost, 4)
  END AS `投资回报率`
FROM qft_area_property ap

focus_tenant_latest AS (

        FROM qft_focus_tenants_info fti

    ) t
    WHERE t.rn = 1

tenant_pool AS (
    SELECT
        fr.store_id,

        fl.tenants_contract_nature AS contract_nature
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    JOIN qft_focus_room fr
        ON fr.id = ft.room_id
       AND fr.company_id = 1001

    JOIN focus_tenant_latest fl
        ON fl.tenant_id = ft.id
    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jr.store_id,
        CONCAT('joint-', jt.id) AS tenant_key,
        jt.lease_starttime AS lease_start,
        jt.lease_endtime AS lease_end,
        jt.tenants_contract_nature AS contract_nature
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    JOIN qft_joint_room jr
        ON jr.id = jt.room_id
       AND jr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
),
store_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        tp.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN tp.contract_nature = 1
             AND tp.lease_start >= mb.month_start
             AND tp.lease_start < mb.next_month_start
            THEN tp.tenant_key
        END) AS month_new_sign_tenants,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN tp.lease_end >= CURDATE()
             AND NOT (
                 tp.contract_nature = 1
                 AND tp.lease_start >= mb.month_start
                 AND tp.lease_start < mb.next_month_start
             )
            THEN tp.tenant_key
        END) AS active_old_tenants,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN tp.lease_end >= CURDATE()
            THEN tp.tenant_key

    FROM tenant_pool tp
    CROSS JOIN month_boundaries mb
    GROUP BY tp.store_id
)
SELECT
    store_id,
    month_new_sign_tenants,
    active_old_tenants,
    active_tenants_total,
    ROUND(active_old_tenants / NULLIF(month_new_sign_tenants, 0), 2) AS old_to_new_ratio,
    ROUND(active_old_tenants / NULLIF(active_tenants_total, 0), 4) AS old_tenant_share
FROM store_metrics
WHERE active_tenants_total >= 10
ORDER BY

    month_new_sign_tenants ASC,

        f.id AS finance_id,

    FROM qft_finance f

      ON fi.finance_id = f.id
     AND fi.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND f.source_type IN (2, 5)
      AND fi.nature = 1
    GROUP BY f.id
),
deduction_stats AS (

        bd.finance_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(bd.deduction_money, 0)) AS deduction_money
    FROM qft_bill_deduction bd
    WHERE bd.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(bd.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY bd.finance_id
),
receivable_stats AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(IFNULL(rf.trade_money, 0)) AS total_receivable_money,
        SUM(IFNULL(rf.real_money, 0) + IFNULL(ds.deduction_money, 0)) AS received_money
    FROM receivable_finance rf
    LEFT JOIN deduction_stats ds
      ON ds.finance_id = rf.finance_id
),
metrics AS (
    SELECT
        rs.total_rooms,
        rs.rented_rooms,
        rs.vacant_rooms,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.total_rooms = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(rs.rented_rooms * 100.00 / rs.total_rooms, 2)
        END AS occupancy_rate,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.total_rooms = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(rs.vacant_rooms * 100.00 / rs.total_rooms, 2)
        END AS vacancy_rate,
        IFNULL(rc.total_receivable_money, 0) AS total_receivable_money,
        IFNULL(rc.received_money, 0) AS received_money,
        CASE
            WHEN IFNULL(rc.total_receivable_money, 0) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(LEAST(100, rc.received_money * 100.00 / rc.total_receivable_money), 2)
        END AS collection_rate
    FROM room_stats rs
    CROSS JOIN receivable_stats rc
)
SELECT
    total_rooms,
    rented_rooms,
    vacant_rooms,
    occupancy_rate,
    collection_rate,
    vacancy_rate,
    ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2, 2) AS health_score,
    CASE
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 95 THEN '出租表现优秀'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 90 THEN '出租表现良好'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 80 THEN '出租表现一般'
        ELSE '出租表现偏弱'
    END AS occupancy_assessment,
    CASE
        WHEN collection_rate >= 95 THEN '回款表现优秀'
        WHEN collection_rate >= 90 THEN '回款表现良好'
        WHEN collection_rate >= 80 THEN '回款表现一般'
        ELSE '回款表现偏弱'
    END AS collection_assessment,
    CASE
        WHEN vacancy_rate <= 5 THEN '空置控制优秀'
        WHEN vacancy_rate <= 10 THEN '空置控制良好'
        WHEN vacancy_rate <= 20 THEN '空置控制一般'
        ELSE '空置压力较大'
    END AS vacancy_assessment,
    CASE
        WHEN ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2, 2) >= 90 THEN '整体业务健康度优秀'
        WHEN ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2, 2) >= 80 THEN '整体业务健康度良好'
        WHEN ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2, 2) >= 70 THEN '整体业务健康度一般'
        ELSE '整体业务健康度需重点关注'
    END AS overall_business_health
FROM metrics;
